STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_HAND_CRANK.title: Hand Crank
STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_HAND_CRANK.descripti: At the start of each combat, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Stress[/gold].
STS2_WINE_FOX_RELIC_HAND_CRANK.flavor: A stubborn crank from another world. It is said that once you see it, you will want to keep turning it.
